MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bianca Ennix, Esq. of the Law Office of Bianca Ennix, Tel. 510.622.0004, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
Ron E. Rayes, Esq. of the Law Office of Ron Rayes, Tel. 650.342.6315, appearing for Cross-defendant and opposing party.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling and decided to hear the motion on its merits. PLAINTIFF NANCY LOUKS' Motion To Amend The Complaint is continued to August 24, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
